The AD Auto Spa Difference

Why Choose Us

We come to you, we use pro-grade products, and we care about every vehicle we touch.

🏠
We Come to You
No drop-offs, no waiting rooms. We show up at your home or work and leave your car spotless.
❄️
Built for Newfoundland
We know NL winters. Our services fight road salt, harsh conditions, and everything your car faces here.
🤜
Hand-Done Every Time
Every detail is done by hand using professional-grade products. Your vehicle deserves more than a drive-through.
📅
7 Days a Week
Flexible scheduling by appointment — mornings, evenings, weekends. We work around your schedule.

★★★★★

"Honestly one of the best services I’ve used in St. John’s. My truck had a full winter’s worth of salt and grime and it came out looking brand new. The fact that they come to you is such a bonus — I didn’t have to take any time off work."

Full Detail
★★★★★

"Booked a Quick Detail for my SUV and I couldn’t believe how clean it was after. Interior smelled amazing and the exterior was spotless. Super professional, showed up right on time. Will absolutely be booking again."

Quick Detail
★★★★★

"I have two dogs and my car was in rough shape. Added the pet hair removal to my Full Detail and I genuinely did not recognize my own back seat. Worth every penny. Highly recommend to any pet owner."

Full Detail + Pet Hair
★★★★★

"Got the Spring Detail done after a rough NL winter and the results were incredible. The underbody cleaning and salt removal made such a difference. You can really tell they know what they’re doing with Newfoundland conditions."
